description:
Create examples/rust/hello/ with a simple Rust binary.

Files needed:
- examples/rust/hello/main.rs - simple hello world
- examples/rust/hello/BUCK - rust_binary target

Should build with:
- `cargo build` (needs Cargo.toml at repo root or in example dir)
- `buck2 build //examples/rust/hello:hello`
title: Rust: simple hello world example
